# polaris_realm (Data Source)

Returns the realm configured in the provider. Useful for passing the realm value to other resources or outputs without repeating the configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polaris_realm" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `realm` (String) The realm configured in the provider block (or POLARIS_REALM). Empty string if no realm was set.
